mdSummary:
# NumberTicker

Animated count-up from zero to target number.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/number-ticker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| NumberTicker | Value | `double` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | StartValue | `double` | `0` |  |
| NumberTicker | DurationMs | `int` | `1500` |  |
| NumberTicker | Decimals | `int` | `0` |  |
| NumberTicker | Prefix | `string?` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | Suffix | `string?` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | ThousandsSeparator | `string` | `","` | Thousands group separator (default ","). Set to empty string to suppress. |
| NumberTicker | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NumberTicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
